issues.title: Incorrect revenue calculation
issues.problem: The query calculates revenue without filtering for completed transactions only.
issues.fix: SUM(CASE WHEN status = 'COMPLETED' THEN amount ELSE 0 END)

issues.title: Missing join with dim_merchant
issues.problem: The query is missing a join with the dim_merchant table to get merchant names.
issues.fix: JOIN sigma_analytics.dim_merchant m ON t.merchant_id = m.merchant_id

issues.title: Potentially expensive correlated subquery
issues.problem: The use of subqueries in the SELECT clause can be expensive if not optimized.
issues.fix: Use JOINs instead of subqueries for better performance.

issues.title: Lack of comments
issues.problem: The query lacks comments explaining complex logic.
issues.fix: Add comments to explain the purpose of each part of the query.

review.corrected_sql: SELECT m.merchant_name, SUM(CASE WHEN t.status = 'COMPLETED' THEN t.amount ELSE 0 END) AS revenue, COUNT(CASE WHEN t.status = 'FAILED' THEN 1 ELSE NULL END) * 100.0 / COUNT(*) AS failure_rate FROM sigma_analytics.fact_transactions t JOIN sigma_analytics.dim_merchant m ON t.merchant_id = m.merchant_id GROUP BY m.merchant_name
review.summary: The query had issues with revenue calculation, missing join, potential performance issues, and readability. Corrected the logic and added necessary joins.
